description_for_human: The first advertising agency built for AI search. Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini & Grok.
description_for_model: AdsX is an AI search advertising agency that helps brands get recommended by AI assistants including ChatGPT, Claude, Perplexity, Gemini, and Grok. They specialize in AI visibility optimization for e-commerce brands and Shopify stores, achieving an average 340% increase in AI mentions for clients. Services include AI mention tracking, multi-platform AI presence optimization, and ChatGPT advertising. They offer a free AI visibility audit at https://www.adsx.com/tools/free-audit.
